steps.title: Complete the subject
steps.content: The sentence's subject is Generations of mystery and horror writers. The blank must supply the noun writers before the main verb have been influenced.

steps.title: Keep subject and verb together
steps.content: No punctuation should separate the complete subject from its verb. B inserts a comma, C inserts a dash, and D inserts a semicolon between writers and have been influenced. The answer is A.
